name: Deer
statsSummary: Summary of stats: Str 11, Dex 16, Con 11, Int 2, Wis 14, Cha 5
statsDescription: The deer has a strength of 11, dexterity of 16, constitution of 11, intelligence of 2, wisdom of 14, and charisma of 5.
statsNote: Stats are based on the standard deer template.
